'''maboho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kacheri|kacheri]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kacheri|kacheri]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| maboho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæbeheth|mæbeheth]] || [[word:mæbehej|mæbehej]] || [[word:mæbehesh|mæbehesh]] || [[word:mæbehe|mæbehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabobohoth|mabobohoth]] || [[word:mabobohoj|mabobohoj]] || [[word:mabobohosh|mabobohosh]] || [[word:maboboho|maboboho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabohoth|mabohoth]] || [[word:mabohoj|mabohoj]] || [[word:mabohosh|mabohosh]] || [[word:maboho|maboho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabofhoth|mabofhoth]] || [[word:mabofhoj|mabofhoj]] || [[word:mabofhosh|mabofhosh]] || [[word:mabofhof|mabofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mabohotho|mabohotho]] || [[word:mabohojo|mabohojo]] || [[word:mabohosho|mabohosho]] || [[word:mabohoko|mabohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mabohoth|mabohoth]] || [[word:mabohoj|mabohoj]] || [[word:mabohosh|mabohosh]] || [[word:maboho|maboho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mabohothol|mabohothol]] || [[word:mabohojol|mabohojol]] || [[word:mabohoshol|mabohoshol]] || [[word:mabohokol|mabohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mabohothotho|mabohothotho]] || [[word:mabohojojo|mabohojojo]] || [[word:mabohoshosho|mabohoshosho]] || [[word:mabohoko|mabohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mabohothon|mabohothon]] || [[word:mabohojon|mabohojon]] || [[word:mabohoshon|mabohoshon]] || [[word:mabohokon|mabohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mabohothoro|mabohothoro]] || [[word:mabohojoro|mabohojoro]] || [[word:mabohoshoro|mabohoshoro]] || [[word:mabohokoro|mabohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
